goal: Audit the full 170-card dataset, assign strength tiers 1/2/3, and display the tier on the top-left yellow badge in card showcase views.
constraints: Use the full active card pool (170 cards) as the source of truth.
Tier must be derived from card strength, not random assignment.
Badge copy must use Chinese level labels and remove accidental English fragments.
Do not refactor unrelated systems in this task.
deliverables: A deterministic 1/2/3 tier assignment strategy applied to card data.
Top-left yellow badge in card showcase cards displays the tier label.
No regression to card count: active pool remains 170.
